---
title: "natural_features"
pagetitle: "natural_features"
toc: false
sidebar: false
page-layout: full
title-block-style: none
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.hero-copy}
[Naturalistic stimulus features]{.eyebrow}

# natural_features turns media and transcripts into time-aligned feature objects.

[Install `natural-features`, import `natural_features`, and keep extracted features tied to stimulus time, provenance, and downstream fMRI windows.]{.lead}

[Start here](start/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[API reference](reference/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}

[stimuli]{.kicker} [catalogue]{.kicker} [recipes]{.kicker} [fMRI windows]{.kicker}
:::
::: {.hero-code}
::: {.code-card}
[quickstart.py]{.code-card-title}
```python
from natural_features.workflows import extract_features

result = extract_features(
    "The scene opens on a quiet room.",
    features=["text.tokenize"],
)

words = result.features["text.tokenize"]
words.label.tolist()
```
:::
:::
:::

## In 30 seconds {.promise-heading}

One request returns a typed event object. The result below is generated when this page renders.

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
from natural_features.workflows import available_features, extract_features

catalog = available_features(modality="text")
result = extract_features(
    "The scene opens on a quiet room.",
    features=["text.tokenize"],
)
words = result.features["text.tokenize"]
labels = words.label.tolist()

print(f"""
::: {{.quick-result}}
::: {{.quick-stat}}
[request]{{.quick-label}}

`text.tokenize`
:::
::: {{.quick-stat}}
[returns]{{.quick-label}}

`{type(words).__name__}` · `{words.schema}`
:::
::: {{.quick-stat}}
[events]{{.quick-label}}

{len(words)} word events
:::
::: {{.quick-words}}
[labels]{{.quick-label}}

{", ".join(f"`{label}`" for label in labels)}
:::
:::
""")
```

## Three contracts {.promise-heading}

::: {.promise-grid}
::: {.promise-card}
#### Stimulus wrappers keep time attached
Audio, video, image, and text inputs enter through typed wrappers before extraction. [Concept](concepts/stimuli.qmd)

[`AudioStimulus`]{.promise-tag}
:::

::: {.promise-card}
#### Feature objects carry schema and provenance
Dense features, events, and tracks have explicit time arrays and required metadata. [Concept](concepts/feature-objects.qmd)

[`FeatureSeries`]{.promise-tag}
:::

::: {.promise-card}
#### Plans expose what will run
The catalogue and planner show feature IDs, required inputs, parameters, and opt-in status before execution. [Concept](concepts/catalog-and-planning.qmd)

[`plan_features`]{.promise-tag}
:::
:::
